name: loan-amount-broker-initial-intent
rationale: Broker initial intake asserts loan_amount $410,000. loan_application doc shows $410,000 (no discrepancy). No subsequent correction. F1.LA canonical-map resolves via broker_initial_intent tier; loan_app source agrees and provides corroboration. Tests broker_initial_intent winning when broker_correction tier is empty.
notes: Single-event sequence. Distinct from A01 (which adds a correction); A02 tests the next-tier-down resolution when correction tier is empty.
